hook.name: TideHook
hook.description: TideHook is a Uniswap v4 hook that acts as both an ERC-20 token (TIDE) and the sole LP of a single v4 pool. It enforces a degressive launch fee schedule (25%→10%→5% forever) by overriding the dynamic LP fee each swap, distributes swap fees pro-rata to TIDE holders via a vesting mechanism, and features a lottery that awards forfeited unclaimed earnings from sellers to a random holder.
